iran_nuke.notes: Day 16 15:04 — ELEVATED STABLE. No new nuclear-specific signals. Iran's Space Research Centre severely damaged in strikes (AJ). No enrichment or IAEA developments. 26 (stable).

iran_conventional.notes: Day 16 15:04 — IMMINENT RISING (capped). NEW: US/Israel strike on Isfahan factory kills 15 (AJ). Shiraz residential areas attacked. IRGC announces '50th wave' of operations against US bases in UAE/Bahrain/Kuwait. Iran's Space Research Centre severely damaged. 20 arrested NW Iran for spying for Israel. Mojtaba Khamenei confirmed as new Supreme Leader, Araghchi says 'no problem.' Tehran: 10,000 homes damaged/destroyed. Iran FM: US cruise missiles launched from UAE. IRGC warns US to move industries out of ME. Tangsiri: Hormuz 'controlled' not closed. 100 (capped, rising).

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 16 15:04 — IMMINENT RISING (capped). Israeli forces kill Palestinian couple + 2 children (ages 5, 7) in Tammun, West Bank — each shot in head (AJ/BBC). Israeli troops say 'We killed dogs.' Sirens in central Israel from Iranian barrages. 826+ killed in Lebanon. 100 (capped, rising).

turkey.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. No new Turkey-specific developments. Erdogan vows Turkey 'will not be dragged into Iran war.' 72 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 78.

india.notes: ELEVATED RISING. No new India-specific developments. Watching Pak-Afghan escalation closely. 25 (rising).

russia.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. No new Russia-ME developments. EU extends Russia sanctions 6 months. 71 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 77.

china.notes: DETERRENT STABLE. No new China/Taiwan developments. UK may send interceptor drones from Ukraine production to Middle East (Telegraph). 15 (stable).

north_korea.notes: CRITICAL RISING. No new DPRK developments since 10-missile salvo on Mar 14. Kim Yo Jong condemns Freedom Shield. 47 (rising).

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 16 15:04 — IMMINENT RISING. Russia launches 430 drones + 68 missiles at Ukraine (Reuters/Guardian). 5 killed in Kyiv region, 1 in Zaporizhzhia suburb. 15 injured. Poland scrambles jets. Moldova reports Russian drone intrusion. Zelenskyy: main target energy infrastructure, 6 regions without power. Arakhamia: Ukraine to assess negotiation 'viability' in 1-2 weeks, may face prolonged war. US paused ceasefire talks due to Iran war (NPR). UK may divert interceptor drones to Middle East — Ukraine air defense depleting. 81 (rising).

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 16 15:04 — IMMINENT RISING (capped). Operation Ghazb lil Haq expanding. Kandahar military strikes ongoing. 115K Afghans, 3K Pakistanis displaced per UNHCR. No ceasefire signals. 99 (capped, rising).

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch:
NO DE-ESCALATION ON ANY FRONT:
- Iran: Isfahan factory hit, 15 killed. Shiraz residential attacked. IRGC 50th wave of strikes on Gulf bases. Space Research Centre destroyed. 10K homes damaged in Tehran alone. New Supreme Leader confirmed. Zero diplomacy.
- Israel-Lebanon: Israeli forces kill Palestinian family (2 adults, 2 children) in West Bank — shot in head. Sirens in central Israel from Iranian barrages.
- Russia-Ukraine: Massive 430-drone/68-missile barrage. 7 killed. 6 regions without power. US paused ceasefire talks due to Iran. Ukraine may face prolonged war. Air defense depleting as UK considers diverting interceptors to Middle East.
- Pakistan-Afghanistan: Operation expanding. 118K displaced.
- US media censorship threat over Iran coverage.
- TEN trackers at imminent/critical. Zero diplomatic progress anywhere.

latest_news.headline: US/Israel strike on Isfahan factory kills 15, Shiraz residential areas attacked
latest_news.text: US and Israel carry out attacks on Isfahan city, killing 15 at a factory. Shiraz residential areas also struck. Tasnim: 'criminal regime attacked residential and deprived area.' 1,400+ killed since Feb 28.

latest_news.headline: IRGC announces '50th wave' of operations against US bases in Gulf
latest_news.text: Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps says it launched its '50th wave' of operations against US bases in UAE, Bahrain and Kuwait. Operations described as retaliation for 'US terrorist army' presence.

latest_news.headline: Iran's Space Research Centre severely damaged in strikes
latest_news.text: Video footage shows severe damage to Iran's Space Research Centre from US-Israeli strikes. Facility believed to have dual-use missile/nuclear research capability.

latest_news.headline: Russia launches 430 drones + 68 missiles at Ukraine, kills 7
latest_news.text: Russia hammers Ukraine with 430 drones and 68 missiles. 5 killed in Kyiv region (energy infrastructure targeted), 1 in Zaporizhzhia suburbs. 15 injured. Poland scrambles jets. Moldova reports Russian drone intrusion.

latest_news.headline: Ukraine to assess negotiation 'viability' in 1-2 weeks — may face prolonged war
latest_news.text: Servant of the People faction leader Arakhamia says Ukraine will assess viability of Russia negotiations in 1-2 weeks. After that, understanding may emerge that country enters prolonged war period.

latest_news.headline: UK may divert interceptor drones from Ukraine production to Middle East
latest_news.text: UK PM Starmer may send thousands of interceptor drones to Middle East. 'Octopus' anti-drone system manufactured for Ukraine may be redirected to defend against Iran's Shaheds. Ukraine air defense depleting.

latest_news.headline: Trump threatens news outlets over critical Iran coverage
latest_news.text: Despite no official documents on 'correct coverage,' US journalists threatened with consequences for reporting unfavorable Iran war news. Shadow censorship regime emerging.

latest_news.headline: Israel kills Palestinian couple and two children in West Bank — each shot in head
latest_news.text: Israeli forces kill Mohammed (5) and Othman (7) alongside their parents in Tammun, West Bank. Each shot in the head. Israeli troops reportedly said 'We killed dogs.'

outlook:
CRITICAL — Global war probability 86% (Day 16 15:04). MULTI-FRONT ESCALATION CONTINUES:

(1) IRAN → IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING): NEW — Isfahan factory strike kills 15. Shiraz residential attacked. IRGC '50th wave' of operations on Gulf bases. Space Research Centre severely damaged. 20 arrested for spying for Israel. New Supreme Leader Mojtaba confirmed. 10K homes damaged in Tehran. Hormuz 'controlled not closed.' Zero diplomacy.

(2) ISRAEL-LEBANON → IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING): Israeli forces kill Palestinian family (2 adults, 2 children) in West Bank — shot in head. Sirens in central Israel from Iranian barrages. 826+ killed in Lebanon.

(3) RUSSIA-UKRAINE → IMMINENT 86 (RISING): Massive 430-drone/68-missile barrage. 7 killed. 6 regions without power. Poland scrambles jets. Moldova drone intrusion. Ukraine to assess negotiation viability in 1-2 weeks. US paused ceasefire talks due to Iran. UK may divert interceptor drones to ME — air defense crisis deepening.

(4) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN → IMMINENT 99 (capped, RISING): Operation expanding. 118K displaced.

(5) RUSSIA → IMMINENT 77 (stable).
(6) TURKEY → IMMINENT 78.
(7) DPRK → CRITICAL 47 (RISING).
(8) INDIA → ELEVATED 25 (RISING).

ZERO DIPLOMATIC OFF-RAMPS. Media censorship threat. Air defense resources being diverted between theaters. Coalition cohesion fraying. US casualties mounting. Proxy attacks expanding. Every front escalating simultaneously.
